mapper.sql: id, pet_id, reviewer_id, review_type, action, remark, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_review_record (pet_id, reviewer_id, review_type, action, remark) VALUES (#{petId}, #{reviewerId}, #{reviewType}, #{action}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pet_review_record WHERE pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT DISTINCT pet_id FROM pet_review_record WHERE reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}

SELECT r.id AS reviewId, p.id AS petId, p.name, (SELECT pi.image_url FROM pet_image pi WHERE pi.pet_id = p.id ORDER BY pi.sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) AS coverImage, c.name AS categoryName, p.age, p.gender, r.action AS myAction, r.remark AS myRemark, r.review_type AS reviewType, r.created_at AS reviewedAt FROM pet_review_record r JOIN pet_info p ON r.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN pet_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE r.reviewer_id = #{reviewerId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
